awesomeList.descriptionHTML: 💻 A curated list of SSH resources.
awesomeList.description: :computer: A curated list of SSH resources.

nodes.itemHTML: • xxhstars1.6k - Bring your favorite shell wherever you go through the ssh.
• ServerAuth - Automatically sync SSH access across servers
• parallel-sshstars882 - Provides parallel versions of OpenSSH and related tools.
• sshuttlestars6.7k - Transparent proxy server that works as a poor man's VPN. Forwards over ssh. Doesn't require admin. Works with Linux and MacOS. Supports DNS tunneling.
• ttydstars3.4k - Share your terminal over the web.
• sshrcstars26 - Bring your .bashrc, .vimrc, etc. with you when you ssh.
• ShellHubstars698 - A SSH gateway for remotely accessing any Linux device behind firewall and NAT.
• sshhub - Web Service: access your SSH servers behind firewalls (ssh-teamviewer).
• sshpiperstars502 - The missing reverse proxy for ssh scp.
• redialstars159 - Terminal Based SSH Session Manager for Unix Systems
• ssh-proxystars31 - Dockerized SSH bastion to proxy SSH connections to arbitrary containers.
• sshportalstars1k - simple, fun, and transparent SSH (& Telnet) Bastion Server
• assh - Transparent wrapper (ProxyCommand) that adds regex, aliases, gateways, includes, dynamic hostnames to SSH and ssh-config. Previously: advanced-ssh-config
• quicsshstars144 - QUIC proxy for SSH
• SSHmonstars155 - Real-time GUI to monitor SSH connections and establish port forwardings.
• sshecretstars52 - Automatically create and manage multiple agents for multiple keys.
• SSHPry v2stars324 - Spy & Control os SSH Connected client's TTY
• Slack notifications (archived version) - Guide to setup Slack notifications (can be modified for other services).
• ssh-pingstars54 - check if host is reachable using ssh_config
• ssh-vaultstars285 - encrypt/decrypt files using ssh keys
• Gist: SSH Recipes - Collection of recipes for writing awesome ssh config files.
• krstars1.6k - Kr agent that route access request to the paired mobile phone where Kryptonite is installed.
• github-keygenstars185 - Easy creation of secure SSH configuration for your GitHub account(s).
• kyratstars157 - SSH wrapper script that brings your dotfiles always with you on Linux and OSX.
• Apache Guacamole - Apache Guacamole is a HTML5 based clientless remote desktop gateway. It supports standard protocols like VNC, RDP, and SSH.
• stormstars3.8k - Manage your SSH like a boss.
• ansible-ssh-configstars97 - Letting Ansible manage ssh_config.
• ec2sshstars234 - A ssh_config manager for AWS EC2.
• ssh-configstars116 - A tool to help manage your .ssh/config file.
• ssh2dockerstars160 - SSH server to Docker containers.
• whostherestars1.8k - A SSH server that knows who you are. $ ssh whoami.filippo.io.
• sshfrontstars262 - Programmable SSH frontend.
• ssh-chatstars4.3k - Chat over SSH.
• sshcommandstars336 - Turn SSH into a thin client specifically for your app.
• sshmuxdstars777 - sshmux frontend.
• x84stars362 - A python telnet/ssh server for modern UTF-8 and classic cp437 network virtual terminals. In spirit of classic software such as ami/x, teleguard, renegade, iniquity.
• teleportstars9.4k - Modern SSH server for clusters and teams.
• sshfsstars3.9k - Filesystem client based on the SSH File Transfer Protocol.
• ngrokstars20.3k - Introspected tunnels to localhost.
• localtunnelstars3.1k - Expose localhost servers to the Internet.
• sshttpstars772 - SSH/HTTP(S) multiplexer. Run a webserver and a sshd on the same port w/o changes.
• switcherstars881 - Run SSH and HTTP(S) on the same port.
• sslhstars3k - Applicative Protocol Multiplexer (i.e: SSH + HTTPS).
• tundstars404 - SSH reverse tunnel daemon.
• wsshstars1.3k - SSH to WebSockets Bridge.
• docker-volume-sshfsstars459 - sshfs docker volume plugin.
• clustersshstars732 - Cluster admin via SSH.
• tmux-cssh - tmux with a ClusterSSH-like behavior.
• tmstars41 - tmux manager / helper.
• i2csshstars500 - csshX like SSH tool for iTerm2.
• authy-sshstars783 - Easy two-factor authentication for SSH servers.
• github-authstars381 - SSH key management for GitHub users.
• cipherhubstars418 - Encrypt messages based on SSH public keys with easy import from GitHub.
• totp-ssh-fluxerstars813 - A way to make sure your sshd port changes every 30 seconds.
• ssh-identstars807 - Different agents and different keys for different projects, with ssh.
• oh-my-zsh/plugins/ssh-agentstars127.5k - ssh-agent plugin for zsh.
• Ansiblestars48.1k - App deployment, configuration management and orchestration over SSH.
• rtopstars1.9k - Interactive, remote system monitoring tool based on SSH.
• GateOnestars6k - HTML5-powered terminal emulator and SSH client.
• KeyBoxstars2.6k - Web-based SSH console that centrally manages administrative access to systems.
• ssh-hammerstars10 - SSH load testing tool.
• kippostars1.4k - SSH Honeypot.
• cowriestars3.6k - SSH Honeypot (based on kippo).
• ssh-auditstars2.7k - A tool for SSH server auditing.
• sshesamestars1.1k - A fake SSH server that lets everyone in and logs their activity.
• GoTTYstars15.3k - Share your terminal as web application.
• Applied-Crypto-Hardeningstars694 - sshd\_config for 6.X
• How to SSH login without a password
• scp - Secure remote file copy utility over SSH.
• rsync - Fast incremental transfer utility that supports SSH.
• sftp - File transfer protocol over SSH.
• curl - Command line tool and library to transfer data (support sftp).
• autossh - Automatically respawn SSH session after network interruption.
• tmux - Terminal multiplexer.
• ClusterSSH - Controls a number of xterm windows via a single graphical console.
• sshmitm - SSH monkey-in-the-middle.
• telnet - An unencrypted network protocol and an application used to connect to remote computers and issue commands.
• rsh - An unencrypted network protocol and application used to connect to remote computers and issue commands.
• How to use SSH to Connect to a Remote Server
• Granting Temporary Access to Your Servers (Using Signed SSH Keys)
• 01/14/2016 - Integer Overflow CVE 2016 077[7-8].
• Security/Guidelines/OpenSSH - MozillaWiki - sshd\_config for 6.7+, 5.3.
• Best practices

• Java
    • jsch - Pure java, BSD licensed, SSH2 client library.

• Python
    • paramikostars7k - Native Python SSHv2 protocol library.
• man page
• Specifications (OpenSSH)
• Wikipedia article
• StackOverflow
• ServerFault
• Mosh - The mobile shell.
• DSH - Dancer's shell / distributed shell - Wrapper for executing multiple remote shell commands from one command line.
• SSH Power Tool - Execute commands and upload files to many servers simultaneously without using pre-shared keys.
• Secure Shell chrome extension

• C/C++
    • libssh - The SSH library.

• Golang
    • crypto/ssh - Built-in SSH client and server library.
    • sftpstars991 - SFTP support for the go.crypto/ssh package.
    • go-sshkitstars20 - Toolkit for building SSH servers and clients in Go.
    • Sockerstars243 - Library for Go to simplify the use of SSH.
    • go-sshkeysstars5 - Golang SSH Keys manipulation library

• Javascript/Node.js
    • ssh2stars4.4k - SSH2 client and server modules written in pure JavaScript for node.js.

• Ruby
    • net-sshstars860 - Pure Ruby implementation of an SSH (protocol 2) client.
